title: Who We Become
overview: Kapwa, a Filipino term that means "togetherness" or "neighbor", is a recognition of a shared identity; an inner self that is shared with others. WHO WE BECOME is a story of kapwa and follows three Filipino women each coming into their political consciousness and discovering themselves during a pivotal moment in their lives.

trailers.title: ARRAY'S WHO WE BECOME | Directed by PJ Raval
